prompt: A perfectly centered sacred-geometry mandala on a clean white background, rendered as an ultra-detailed visionary ink-and-pointillism illustration. The composition is radially symmetrical and circular overall, glowing with warm gold, saffron, orange, coral, magenta, violet, and hints of cyan at the core. In the exact center, place a radiant circular nucleus with a bright cyan-blue dot surrounded by concentric rings of pink, magenta, orange, and gold, like a luminous spiritual sun. Around it, build many densely packed concentric bands of tiny jewel-like eyes, bead forms, dots, and filigree, all arranged with precise rotational symmetry. Form a four-point diamond structure around the center, with 4 large petal-like flame clusters pointing up, down, left, and right, and 4 smaller curled spiral clusters in the diagonal quadrants. At the outer cardinal points, include 4 larger almond-shaped eye motifs embedded in feathery golden forms. Across the mandala, include dozens of miniature multicolored eyes set into rings, suggesting omniscient awareness. Use extremely fine stippling, micro-linework, ornate feathered textures, and shimmering decorative detail, with the inner structure predominantly luminous gold and ivory, transitioning to a diffuse halo of violet and lavender stippled particles at the outer edge. The image should feel mystical, transcendent, intricate, balanced, and meditative, like a celestial mandala or visionary sacred emblem, with crisp high-detail line art and soft radiant color blending.
